accounts.name: spl_usdc_mint
docs: The SPL USDC mint backing the protocol wrapping vault.

accounts.name: subscriber_wrapped_account
docs: Subscriber's Token-2022 wrapped USDC account (source of the transfer).

accounts.name: merchant_wrapped_account
docs: Merchant's Token-2022 wrapped USDC account (destination of the transfer).

accounts.name: wrapped_usdc_mint
docs: The Token-2022 wrapped USDC mint charged by the billing transfer.

accounts.name: mint
docs: The token mint to register.

accounts.name: mint_authority
docs: permanent delegate, and vault owner. Seeds: [b"mint-authority"]

accounts.name: wrapped_usdc_mint
docs: The Token-2022 wrapped USDC mint account to create.

accounts.name: spl_usdc_mint
docs: The SPL USDC mint (not Token-2022) used for the backing vault.

accounts.name: wrapping_vault
docs: The SPL USDC vault ATA for holding subscriber deposits.
Owned by mint_authority PDA, associated with spl_usdc_mint.

accounts.name: plan
docs: either a flat `VelaPlan` PDA or a usage `UsagePlan` PDA.

accounts.name: spl_usdc_mint
docs: The SPL USDC mint (Token program, not Token-2022).

accounts.name: wrapped_usdc_mint
docs: The Token-2022 wrapped USDC mint (must match config.wrapped_usdc_mint).

accounts.name: user_wrapped_account
docs: User's Token-2022 wrapped USDC account (source to burn from).

accounts.name: user_usdc_account
docs: User's SPL USDC account (destination for released USDC).

accounts.name: wrapping_vault
docs: Protocol's SPL USDC vault (releases USDC to user, must match config.wrapping_vault).

accounts.name: spl_usdc_mint
docs: The SPL USDC mint (Token program, not Token-2022).

accounts.name: wrapped_usdc_mint
docs: The Token-2022 wrapped USDC mint (must match config.wrapped_usdc_mint).

accounts.name: subscriber_usdc_account
docs: Subscriber's SPL USDC token account (source of SPL USDC deposit).

accounts.name: destination_wrapped_account
docs: Subscriber's Token-2022 wrapped USDC account (destination for minted wrapped USDC).

accounts.name: wrapping_vault
docs: Protocol's SPL USDC vault (receives subscriber deposit, must match config.wrapping_vault).

errors.name: PullTooEarly
errors.msg: Pull attempted before next_payment_due

errors.name: MandateNotActive
errors.msg: Mandate has expired or been cancelled

errors.name: MaxPullsExceeded
errors.msg: Maximum pulls exhausted for this mandate

errors.name: InsufficientBalance
errors.msg: Subscriber has insufficient token balance

errors.name: UnauthorizedCancel
errors.msg: Only the subscriber can cancel their mandate

errors.name: FrequencyTooLow
errors.msg: Plan frequency below minimum (3600 seconds)

errors.name: Overflow
errors.msg: Arithmetic overflow

errors.name: PlanNotActive
errors.msg: Plan is not active

errors.name: MandateExpired
errors.msg: Mandate has expired

errors.name: AmountExceedsPlanAmount
errors.msg: Pull amount exceeds plan amount

errors.name: MaxPullsTooLow
errors.msg: Plan max_pulls must be at least 1

errors.name: ApprovalNotGranted
errors.msg: No valid PullApproval PDA exists -- Arcium validation required

errors.name: ApprovalExpired
errors.msg: PullApproval has expired (past valid_until timestamp)

errors.name: AbortedComputation
errors.msg: Arcium computation was aborted or produced invalid output

errors.name: ClusterNotSet
errors.msg: Arcium cluster not configured in ProtocolConfig

errors.name: UnauthorizedAdmin
errors.msg: Only the protocol admin can perform this action

errors.name: ApprovalAlreadyExists
errors.msg: PullApproval already exists for this billing period

errors.name: ArciumUnavailable
errors.msg: Arcium is unavailable -- pull blocked (fail-closed per D-01)

errors.name: InvalidCiphertextInput
errors.msg: Encrypted input payload length does not match the circuit interface

errors.name: PendingBillingRecord
errors.msg: The previous pull is missing its billing record; finalize billing before executing again

errors.name: BillingEventAlreadyExists
errors.msg: BillingEvent already exists for this pull execution

errors.name: InvalidArciumAccount
errors.msg: Arcium account set does not match the configured canonical PDAs

errors.name: InvalidProtocolConfig
errors.msg: ProtocolConfig contains an invalid or inconsistent Arcium cluster configuration

errors.name: InvalidCallbackBinding
errors.msg: The supplied Arcium callback does not match the queued Vela request

errors.name: InvalidComputationOffset
errors.msg: Computation offset must match the protocol-derived request identity

errors.name: WrappedMintAlreadyInitialized
errors.msg: Wrapped USDC mint has already been initialized

errors.name: TransferNotAuthorized
errors.msg: Transfer not authorized -- no valid PullApproval and not a wrap/unwrap operation

errors.name: VaultMismatch
errors.msg: Wrapping vault mismatch -- vault address does not match ProtocolConfig

errors.name: UsdcMintMismatch
errors.msg: SPL USDC mint mismatch -- provided mint is not the expected USDC mint

errors.name: WrappedMintNotInitialized
errors.msg: Wrapped USDC mint not yet initialized in ProtocolConfig

errors.name: UnauthorizedAgent
errors.msg: Only the authorized agent signer can execute this pull

errors.name: UnauthorizedService
errors.msg: Destination service is not authorized on this agent mandate

errors.name: TooManyServices
errors.msg: Agent mandate service list exceeds the maximum allowed entries

errors.name: DuplicateService
errors.msg: Agent mandate service list contains a duplicate service

errors.name: MandatePaused
errors.msg: Agent mandate is paused and cannot process pulls

errors.name: MandateRevoked
errors.msg: Agent mandate is revoked and cannot process pulls

errors.name: DailyLimitExceeded
errors.msg: Agent mandate daily limit would be exceeded by this pull

errors.name: ServiceDailyLimitExceeded
errors.msg: Service daily limit would be exceeded by this pull

errors.name: LifetimeCapExceeded
errors.msg: Agent mandate lifetime cap would be exceeded by this pull

errors.name: PullAmountTooSmall
errors.msg: Pull amount is below the agent mandate minimum pull amount

errors.name: PullCooldownActive
errors.msg: Agent mandate pull cooldown is still active

errors.name: InvalidServiceList
errors.msg: Agent mandate service list is invalid

errors.name: AgentMandateAlreadyExists
errors.msg: Agent mandate already exists for this authority and agent

errors.name: AgentMandateNotFound
errors.msg: Agent mandate account was not found

errors.name: InsufficientMandateBalance
errors.msg: Mandate-owned wrapped token account has insufficient balance

errors.name: NoFundsToDrain
errors.msg: Agent mandate has no funds available to drain

errors.name: InvalidAgentMandateStatusTransition
errors.msg: Requested agent mandate status transition is invalid

errors.name: UnauthorizedAgentMandateAuthority
errors.msg: Only the agent mandate authority can perform this action

errors.name: EndpointTooLong
errors.msg: Keeper endpoint exceeds maximum length (128 bytes)

errors.name: EndpointEmpty
errors.msg: Keeper endpoint must not be empty

errors.name: InvalidKeeperAuthority
errors.msg: Keeper authority must not be the default (zero) public key

errors.name: UnauthorizedKeeper
errors.msg: Caller is not the authorized keeper

errors.name: NoUpdateProvided
errors.msg: At least one field must be provided for update

errors.name: InvalidTierCount
errors.msg: Usage plan requires 1-5 pricing tiers

errors.name: BillingTypeMismatch
errors.msg: Operation requires a different billing type

errors.name: InvalidPeriod
errors.msg: Invalid period boundaries

errors.name: PeriodMismatch
errors.msg: Usage report period must align with mandate next_payment_due

errors.name: InvalidAmount
errors.msg: Amount must be greater than zero

errors.name: InvalidFrequency
errors.msg: Settlement frequency must be greater than zero

errors.name: InvalidTierBoundary
errors.msg: Tier boundaries must be monotonically increasing

errors.name: ProtocolPaused
errors.msg: Protocol is paused -- billing pulls are blocked

errors.name: UsageReportAlreadySettled
errors.msg: Usage report has already been settled

errors.name: MandateVersionUnsupported
errors.msg: Mandate version is unsupported by this instruction

errors.name: PlanVersionUnsupported
errors.msg: Plan version is unsupported by this instruction

errors.name: MigrationPreconditionFailed
errors.msg: Migration preconditions are not satisfied

errors.name: AgentMandateVersionUnsupported
errors.msg: Agent mandate version is unsupported by this instruction

errors.name: TokenNotRegistered
errors.msg: Token mint is not registered in the token registry

errors.name: TokenAlreadyRegistered
errors.msg: Token mint is already registered in the token registry

errors.name: TokenDisabled
errors.msg: Token is disabled in the registry

errors.name: InvalidBillingRail
errors.msg: Invalid billing rail for this operation

errors.name: MetaListAlreadyInitialized
errors.msg: ExtraAccountMetaList already initialized for this mint

errors.name: WrongAccountType
errors.msg: Account discriminator does not match the expected Vela account type

errors.name: StreamNotActive
errors.msg: Stream mandate is not active

errors.name: StreamAlreadyPaused
errors.msg: Stream mandate is already paused

errors.name: StreamAlreadyCancelled
errors.msg: Stream mandate is already cancelled

errors.name: MinSettleIntervalViolation
errors.msg: Stream settlement attempted before min_settle_interval elapsed

errors.name: AmountExceedsStreamRate
errors.msg: Stream settlement amount exceeds the authorized stream rate

errors.name: StreamCapExceeded
errors.msg: Stream lifetime cap would be exceeded

errors.name: ClockRegression
errors.msg: Clock regression detected while settling stream accrual

errors.name: RateMustBeNonZero
errors.msg: Stream rate_per_second must be greater than zero

errors.name: MinSettleIntervalTooLow
errors.msg: Stream min_settle_interval must be at least 60 seconds

errors.name: AuthorizedMaxRateTooLow
errors.msg: authorized_max_rate must be greater than or equal to rate_per_second

errors.name: UnauthorizedStreamSigner
errors.msg: Signer is not authorized for the requested stream operation

errors.name: InvalidStreamAddress
errors.msg: Provided stream mandate PDA does not match the canonical stream seeds

errors.name: TokenChangeNotSupported
errors.msg: Changing a mandate between token rails is not supported in this upgrade path

errors.name: TokenConfigDecimalsMismatch
errors.msg: TokenConfig decimals must match the on-chain Mint decimals

errors.name: NoPendingChange
errors.msg: There is no pending plan change to cancel or finalize

errors.name: PendingPlanAccountMissing
errors.msg: The pending plan account was not supplied in the instruction account set

errors.name: UnauthorizedUpgrade
errors.msg: Only the subscriber may authorize this upgrade

errors.name: MathDivByZero
errors.msg: Proration period total must be greater than zero

errors.name: MathOverflow
errors.msg: Proration math overflowed its supported range

errors.name: MathUnderflow
errors.msg: Proration math underflowed its supported range

errors.name: InvalidElapsed
errors.msg: Elapsed seconds must be less than or equal to the period total

types.name: PricingTier
docs: A single tier in a usage-based pricing schedule.
24 bytes total (3 x u64).

types.name: UsageChargeOutput
docs: Output struct for both usage_charge and tiered_pricing circuits.
Both circuits return a single u64 plaintext value (the computed charge amount).

types.name: UsagePlan
docs: UsagePlan PDA — a merchant's usage-based pricing plan with up to 5 tiers.
Seeds: [b"usage_plan", merchant.key().as_ref(), plan_id.to_le_bytes().as_ref()]

types.name: UsageReport
docs: UsageReport PDA — encrypted usage data submitted by a merchant for a billing period.
Seeds: [b"usage_report", mandate.key().as_ref(), period_start.to_le_bytes().as_ref()]
